label: numeric_string
note: Number as a string — checks if API requires real integer type vs string

label: array_value
note: Array instead of a single integer — wrong container type

label: object_value
note: Object instead of a single integer — wrong container type

label: negative_number
note: Negative value — may be invalid for limit/offset/id; let spec decide

label: zero
note: Zero — boundary; may be valid or not depending on spec

label: exceeds_int_max
note: Exceeds 32-bit signed int range — type overflow probe

label: scientific_notation
note: Scientific notation as string — checks if accepted as integer

label: no_value
note: Field present but no value. Query -> field=; body -> omit. Handled by Step 5 Special Value Handling

label: missing_field
note: Field key entirely absent everywhere. Tests missing parameter

label: duplicate_param
note: Send the parameter twice with valid value. Query -> field=valid&field=valid; skipped for body. Expected result is API-dependent
